description_long: This is a single-story suburban house set on a large rectangular green lawn. The house features a dark gable roof and light-colored exterior walls, with a small front porch flanked by two bushes or small trees. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, and the entryway is accessed by a short set of steps. The side and rear views show minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy and simplicity. The overall design is compact and functional, typical of a ranch-style home found in residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story ranch-style house with a dark gable roof, light exterior walls, and a small front porch set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch, and two bushes flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the length of the house, a single window, and the side profile of the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal window openings and a simple, unadorned facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing another window and the side profile of the house and roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with small porch, steps, and flanking bushes
